faq.q: How long does a project usually take?
faq.a: Most landing pages take 5–7 days. Business websites take 10–14 days, and full custom or e-commerce projects take 3–5 weeks depending on scope. I'll give you an exact timeline after our first chat.

faq.q: How much do I need to pay upfront?
faq.a: I usually require 50% upfront to begin work, with the remaining 50% due on delivery. For larger projects, payment can be split into milestones — we'll agree on this before starting.

faq.q: Do you offer revisions if I don't like something?
faq.a: Yes. Every package includes revision rounds before final delivery, so we can fine-tune the design and content together until you're happy with it.

faq.q: What if I don't have content or images ready yet?
faq.a: No problem — I can work with placeholder content to start, or help source stock images and write draft copy so we don't lose time waiting.

faq.q: Do you handle hosting and domains too?
faq.a: Yes, I can set up hosting and connect your domain for you. If you don't have a domain yet, I'll help you pick and register one.

faq.q: What happens after the site is delivered?
faq.a: You get a fully working site plus basic guidance on how to manage it. Premium and E-commerce packages include a free support period after launch, and ongoing maintenance is available afterward if you need it.
